title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce-version
text:
Type: Label
Example:
pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce-version: "1.36"
Used on: Namespace
Value
must
be
latest
or a valid Kubernetes version in the format
v<major>.<minor>
.
This determines the version of the
Pod Security Standard
policies to apply when validating a Pod.
See
Enforcing Pod Security at the Namespace Level
for more information.
